links.targetTitle: Chat 1-to-1 PSS messaging with feed-indexed history shipped

global.title: Chat file uploads and inline previews shipped with 200 MB cap
global.content:
## What shipped

Chat file sharing is feature-complete for the current scope:

- **Raw file uploads** via `swarm-file.ts` with cached ACT grantees - images, PDF, audio, video, text.
- **Inline previews** in `message-bubble.tsx` and `files-tab.tsx` - image / GIF / PDF iframe / audio / video / text.
- **Drag-and-drop** via `ThreadDropZone` in `chat-panel.tsx`.
- **Lightbox + universal preview modal** in the Files tab, portaled with `data-chat-overlay` so the chat panel stays open underneath.
- **External Swarm-link previews** for `bzz://<hash>` and `https://.../bzz/<hash>` - detected in `MessageBody`, probed via `ChatManager.probeSwarmReference`.
- **200 MB upload cap** - `MAX_FILE_SIZE` enforced in adapter and client.
- **Video codec pre-flight** with `canPlayType` and an `onError` download fallback on `<video>`.
- **Broad mime-guess** - MKV, FLV, 3GP, TS/MTS, WMV, VOB, etc. in `mime-guess.ts`.
- **Unread badge** on sidebar chat icon via `useUnreadCount` + custom-event dispatch.

## Implication

The media-sharing surface is done; remaining gap is Swarm-link detection inside the Files tab list.
global.description: Raw file uploads (images, PDF, audio, video, text) with inline previews, drag-drop, lightbox, bzz-link detection and 200 MB cap are all shipped.
